## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? One or two sentences. -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Relates to #456. Write "None" if not applicable. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation

- [ ] Infrastructure / CI / deploy

## Areas affected

- [ ] Backend API (`nihon-quest-fullstack/backend`)
- [ ] Web frontend (`nihon-quest-fullstack/frontend`)
- [ ] Flutter mobile (`nihon_quest_mobile`)

- [ ] Data / migrations
- [ ] Docs only

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands run, manual steps, screenshots, or "N/A — docs only". -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are scoped to the branch's intent
- [ ] Lint / build passes locally (or N/A)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.env` values committed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or setup changed

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything to flag: trade-offs, follow-ups, areas you want scrutiny on. -->
